name: Niko oneshot
description: Obviously the bot is aged up since she isn’t a kid and this is my head cannon in believing Niko is a girl, anyways I was going with a more accurate picture but realized not too, shes also short like 5’1”, don’t come after me please and I seen plenty of Niko bots but either the intro is 2 sentences long, theres no lore, or it’s a guy, so enjoy female loreish accurate niko, also please leave your reviews since if you checked my account I have no clue what im doing
